title: 2018 Hyundai H-1 2.5 CRDi Elite Auto
description: This stylish white vehicle combines practicality with comfort, featuring leather seats and a suite of modern options including electric windows, air conditioning, cruise control, and park distance control to make every journey smooth and enjoyable. Equipped with a reliable automatic transmission and a robust 125kW diesel engine, it offers a maximum speed of 180 km/h and a fuel efficiency averaging 9.8 litres per 100 km. Safety is a priority with four airbags, ABS as standard, and an alarm system to keep you secure.

title: 2022 Haval Jolion 1.5T Premium Auto
description: Discover the stylish Haval Jolion 1.5T Premium Auto, finished in sleek black and ready to impress. This versatile cross-over features a smooth automatic dual-clutch transmission and a lively 105kW petrol engine, offering an enjoyable and efficient driving experience. Inside, you'll find a spacious cabin equipped with electric windows, air conditioning, LED lights, and a quality radio system, ensuring comfort on every journey. Safety is a top priority with four airbags, ABS brakes, and park distance control for confident manoeuvres. The Jolion delivers an average fuel consumption of 7.5L per 100km and a practical fuel range of 760km, making it suitable for daily commuting or family adventures. Despite its mileage of 93,170 km, it remains in good condition, reflecting its solid build and regular maintenance.

title: 2014 BMW 3 Series 320i M Sport Auto
description: Discover the stylish and sporty BMW 3 Series 320i M Sport Auto, a sleek blue sedan that combines elegance with performance. This vehicle boasts a refined design accentuated by LED lights, a sunroof, and leather seats that promise comfort and class. Powered by a 135kW petrol engine, it offers a lively drive with a top speed of 235 km/h and impressive fuel economy of around 5.9 litres per 100 km. The automatic transmission ensures smooth gear shifts, perfect for city cruising or highway adventures. Stay safe with six airbags, ABS, and an alarm system, while features like electric windows, air conditioning, cruise control, and park distance control add to the convenience.

title: 2016 Mercedes-Benz A-Class A 250 Sport Auto Hatch
description: Discover the stylish and sporty Mercedes-Benz A-Class A 250 Sport Auto, a fantastic hatchback that combines luxury with practicality. Finished in a sleek grey, this vehicle boasts a dynamic 160kW petrol engine and an advanced dual-clutch automatic transmission, ensuring smooth and responsive driving. With a top speed of 240 km/h, it's perfect for those who enjoy a spirited drive. The A-Class features a sophisticated array of options including LED lights, Xenon headlights, a sunroof, and leather seats that add a touch of elegance. Safety is front and centre with seven airbags, ABS, and park distance control, complemented by a rear-view camera for easy parking.

title: 2017 Toyota Etios 1.5 XS Sprint Sedan
description: Discover the reliable Toyota Etios 1.5 XS, a stylish white sedan perfect for everyday driving. With a modest 138,245 km on the clock, this well-maintained vehicle offers good condition and great value. Its manual transmission provides an engaging driving experience, while the 66kW petrol engine delivers a smooth and efficient ride. Top speed reaches 165 km/h, making motorway cruising comfortable. Inside, you'll find essential features such as electric windows, airbags for safety, air conditioning to keep you cool, and a radio to keep you entertained. Safety is prioritised with standard ABS brakes and an alarm system.

title: 2015 Audi A3 Sedan 1.8 TFSI SE Manual Low Kilos
description: Introducing the stylish Audi A3 Sedan 1.8 TFSI SE, a vibrant red beauty that's perfect for those who love a mix of fun and practicality. With a sleek body and a punchy 132kW petrol engine, this car offers an exhilarating drive with a top speed of 242 km/h. Its manual transmission ensures you stay connected to the road, while features like cruise control and electric windows add to the driving comfort. Safety is prioritised with seven airbags and ABS as standard, providing peace of mind on every journey. The full service record guarantees reliable performance, complemented by LED and Xenon lights that light up the night. The sunroof invites the outdoors in, making every trip a special occasion.

title: 2015 Nissan X-Trail 1.6 dci XE 5 Seater
description: This Nissan X-Trail 1.6 dCi XE offers an excellent driving experience with its robust diesel engine and practical SUV design. Finished in sleek silver, it combines style with functionality, perfect for families or those who need extra space. The vehicle boasts a solid set of features including air conditioning, electric windows, and six airbags for safety. Xenon headlights and park distance control make every journey easier, while cruise control adds comfort on longer drives. With a fuel consumption of just 5.1 litres per 100 km and an impressive range, this vehicle is both economical and reliable. The manual transmission provides an engaging drive, with a top speed of 188 km/h. Its condition is very good, with a mileage of 164,625 km, making it a great option for those seeking dependability.

title: 2019 Renault Duster 1.5 dCi Prestige Automatic
description: Discover the stylish and reliable Renault Duster 1.5 dCi Prestige Auto in a striking blue finish, perfect for urban adventures or countryside escapes. With a modest 83,660 km on the clock, this excellent condition crossover combines practicality with flair. Its automatic dual-clutch transmission ensures smooth driving, while the 80kW diesel engine delivers an impressive fuel range of approximately 1042 km and fuel efficiency of just 4.8 L/100 km. The Duster is packed with features including four airbags, ABS, LED lights, rear-view camera, air conditioning, and a sophisticated alarm system for added safety and comfort. Enjoy luxe leather seats and the convenience of electric windows, park distance control, cruise control, and a quality radio to keep you entertained.

title: 2021 Toyota Avanza 1.5 SX Manual 7 Seater
description: Discover the versatile Toyota Avanza 1.5 SX, a practical MPV that's perfect for family outings and city adventures. This silver beauty combines style with functionality, featuring a reliable manual transmission and a lively 77kW petrol engine. Whether you're cruising at a top speed of 165 km/h or navigating daily errands, this vehicle offers an enjoyable drive. Equipped with essential safety features like airbags and ABS, along with comfort options such as electric windows, air conditioning, and an alarm system, it's designed to keep everyone safe and comfortable on the road.

title: 2021 Nissan Almera 1.5 Acenta
description: Discover the Nissan Almera 1.5 Acenta, a stylish and reliable sedan finished in a distinctive brown colour. With a modest mileage of 119000 km and a solid full service record, this vehicle promises peace of mind and consistent performance. Its manual transmission offers an engaging drive, while the 73kW petrol engine delivers a maximum speed of 183 km/h with an impressive fuel range of up to 651 km and fuel efficiency of 6.3 L/100 km. The Almera is packed with practical features including electric windows, air conditioning, airbags for safety, an alarm system, and park distance control to make city driving a breeze.

title: 2025 Chery Tiggo 4 Pro 1.5 Lit Auto FSH Low Mileage
description: Discover the stylish and reliable Chery Tiggo 4 Pro 1.5T Lit Auto, a fantastic crossover in crisp white. With only 28,105 km on the clock and maintained with a full service record, Manufacture warranty valid until 150 000km or 2030, service plan valid until December 2026 or on 37000km, this vehicle offers excellent condition and peace of mind. Its sleek exterior is complemented by LED lights and a rear-view camera, making parking and night driving safer and more stylish.

title: 2012 Mercedes-Benz C-Class C 200 CDI Avantgarde Auto
description: Discover the stylish and reliable Mercedes-Benz C-Class C 200 CDi Avantgarde Auto, a perfect blend of luxury and performance. Dressed in a sleek white finish, this elegant sedan offers a smooth driving experience with its automatic transmission and a powerful 100kW diesel engine. Designed for comfort and convenience, it features leather seats, climate control, and a sunroof to brighten your journeys. Stay safe with seven airbags, ABS, and an alarm system, while LED and Xenon lights ensure excellent visibility.

title: 2024 Renault Triber 1.0 Dynamique Manual 7 Seater
description: Discover the practical and stylish Renault Triber 1.0 Dynamique, a versatile MPV perfect for family trips or daily runs. Painted in a clean white finish, this vehicle combines modern appeal with everyday functionality. Its reliable 52 kW petrol engine delivers a smooth and fuel-efficient drive, with an impressive fuel consumption of around 5.5 litres per 100 km and a range of approximately 727 km. The manual gearbox offers an engaging driving experience, making every journey enjoyable.

title: 2020 Mahindra Pik Up 2.2 mHawk S4 SC
2021 Kia K-Series Pick-Up K 2700 Workhorse Diesel Manual
description: Meet the rugged Kia K-Series Pick-Up K 2700 Workhorse, a dependable workhorse ready to tackle any job. With a robust diesel engine delivering 62kw, this white single cab chassis boasts a good condition after 118,005 km of reliable service. Its manual transmission ensures you stay in control, whether hauling loads or cruising around town. Practical features include a towbar for towing essentials, aircon to keep you comfortable during long drives, and an alarm for peace of mind. While it doesn't come with airbags, safety considerations are complemented by its sturdy build.

title: 2019 Volkswagen Polo 1.4 Comfortline
description: With a mileage of 127,410 km, this excellent-condition hatchback combines reliability with style. It's packed with features including ABS for safety, air conditioning to keep you comfortable, and electric windows for convenience. The Polo also boasts a modern radio with Bluetooth, AUX, and USB connectivity, perfect for your favourite tunes. Safety is prioritised with airbags and an alarm system, while the sleek design is complemented by its bright colour and well-maintained condition. Additional extras like remote central locking, fog lights, power steering, and a multifunction steering wheel make every drive enjoyable.
